description_long: This object is a loosely tied garbage bag, appearing to be made of thin, semi-glossy plastic with a blue tint and various printed labels and graphics on its surface. The bag is irregularly shaped, with bulges and folds suggesting it is moderately full and contains soft, lightweight refuse. The exterior is marked by visible creases and wrinkles, and there are areas where the plastic is stretched, indicating internal pressure from the contents. Several printed elements, including barcodes, text, and colorful graphics, are visible, giving the bag a cluttered, urban appearance. The closure appears to be a simple knot, with excess plastic gathered at one end. The bag is shown resting on the ground, with no visible support or container.
description: A moderately full, blue-tinted plastic garbage bag with printed labels and a knotted closure, showing bulges and creases. The bag is resting on the ground and appears to contain lightweight refuse.
description_view_0: The front view shows the knotted closure and a large area of printed labels and graphics, with the bag's bulging shape and creased surface clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the twisted knot and the blue plastic material, with more visible folds and a prominent seam running along the side.
description_view_2: The rear view is mostly in shadow, showing the rounded, bulging back of the bag with minimal visible detail.
description_view_3: This angled view emphasizes the bag's irregular shape, with deep creases and a mix of blue and dark areas, as well as some red-tinted sections.
attribute_fullness_or_bulging: moderately full with visible bulging and creases
